HGSS.518.0000:
I am Karen of the Elite Four.\f
You’re [0103,0000,0000]? How amusing.
I love Dark-type Pokémon.\f
I’m known for my overpowering tactics.\f
Think you can take them?
Just try to entertain me.\f
Let’s go.\f
HGSS.518.0001:
Strong Pokémon.\f
Weak Pokémon.\f
That is only the selfish perception
of people.\f
Truly skilled Trainers should try to
win with the Pokémon they love best.\f
I like your style.
You understand what’s important.\f
Go on--the Champion is waiting.\f
